---
title: My dynamic report
output: html_fragment
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{css}
body {
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
}

h2 {
  color: #2c3e50;
}

p {
  line-height: 1.6;
}
```

## FFXIV Player Behaviour and Content Engagement
This report explores how players engage with Final Fantasy XIV, focusing on play style (solo vs group), time spent in-game, preferred regions, login times, and the types of content players engage in.

```{r}
logged_data <- read_csv(
  "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQmLR9YNtIFLA77OEYhem6iBzMJNcv9EgSl3hkWze5qoX7pIFhxFYy9tu71w-oW3dyPcy_eBbtVLDb8/pub?output=csv"
)

latest_data <- logged_data %>%
  rename(
    login_time   = `When do you most often log onto the game?`,
    content_type = `Which of the following types of content do you most commonly engage in? (This should be something you do regularly, such as participating in a static for raiding)`,
    region       = `Which region do you play in the most? (This includes things like if you DC travel to Materia, or have an alt account on Light DC etc.)`,
    hours_daily  = `How many hours do you spend on the game daily?`,
    play_style   = `Do you play more often as a solo or in a group?`
  ) %>%
  mutate(hours_daily = as.numeric(hours_daily))

avg_hours <- latest_data %>%
  group_by(play_style) %>%
  summarise(avg_hours = round(mean(hours_daily, na.rm = TRUE), 1))

top_region <- latest_data %>%
  count(region, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1)

top_login <- latest_data %>%
  count(login_time, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1)

solo_avg <- avg_hours %>%
  filter(play_style == "Solo") %>%
  pull(avg_hours)

group_avg <- avg_hours %>%
  filter(play_style == "Group") %>%
  pull(avg_hours)

comment_1 <- paste0(
  "Players who play in groups spend an average of ",
  group_avg,
  " hours per day, compared to ",
  solo_avg,
  " hours per day for solo players."
)

comment_2 <- paste0(
  "The most common region is ",
  top_region$region,
  ", and the most popular login time is ",
  top_login$login_time,
  "."
)

cat(comment_1, "\n\n", comment_2)

# ---- Content types ----
content_data <- latest_data %>%
  separate_rows(content_type, sep = ", ") %>%
  count(play_style, content_type)

ggplot(content_data, aes(x = content_type, y = n, fill = play_style)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Content Types by Play Style",
    x = "Content Type",
    y = "Number of Players",
    fill = "Play Style"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# ---- Region chart ----
region_data <- latest_data %>%
  count(play_style, region)

ggplot(region_data, aes(x = region, y = n, fill = play_style)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Player Regions by Play Style",
    x = "Region",
    y = "Number of Players",
    fill = "Play Style"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
  
# ---- Login time chart ----
login_data <- latest_data %>%
  count(play_style, login_time)

ggplot(login_data, aes(x = login_time, y = n, fill = play_style)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Login Times by Play Style",
    x = "Login Time",
    y = "Number of Players",
    fill = "Play Style"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
